title: Reporting Capabilities - Pdf and or excel - All table and board views
excerpt: Just a basic basic request – My team doesn’t allow add ons and extensions, which i see a few folks offering in this community. It would be great if Monday allowed users to export a pdf of any board, table or dashboard vi…

posts.author: SIGH (B)
posts.cookedHtml: Just a basic basic request – My team doesn’t allow add ons and extensions, which i see a few folks offering in this community. It would be great if Monday allowed users to export a pdf of any board, table or dashboard view, to a clear pdf and/or excel in a usable and clear format without the hybrid text and formatting mix that excel currently shows. Much too much time is spend editing the table or the excel file to be readable and usable. Other similar tools offer this type of standard reporting, would love to see it here as well.
